items.name: ryzen-ai-documentation
items.description: Onboarding documentation source for the AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform.   The AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform enables developers to take pretrained machine learning models in popular frameworks and run them on laptops powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI technology.

items.name: Customer-Churn-Prediction-with-Profit-Optimized-Machine-Learning-Business-Decision-Framework
items.description: End-to-end customer churn prediction system using machine learning, feature engineering, and probability calibration. The project goes beyond prediction by optimizing decision thresholds based on business profit, implementing customer segmentation, lift analysis, and explainable AI (SHAP) to support data-driven retention strategies.

items.name: Donation-forecasting-research
items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

items.name: Carbon-MRV-India
items.description: Automated carbon credit monitoring system using NASA satellite data and machine learning to track reforestation in Rajasthan, generating verified reports for India's CCTS framework.

items.name: AI-DRIVEN-SAFETY-AND-RISK-MANAGEMENT-FRAMEWORKFORMININGOPERATIONS
items.description: Mining operations are high-risk environments requiring safety, efficiency, and reliability. This project proposes an AI-driven framework using computer vision, machine learning, and predictive analytics to monitor hazards, predict risks, analyze ore quality, and improve decision-making, ensuring safer and more efficient mining operations.

items.name: pipeML

The system is designed to automate API validation, analyze responses, and generate detailed reports for developers and testers.

The workflow can be invoked on command line or web service, as well as integrated into UX/UI as part of a larger intelligent solution.

items.name: automotive-demand-forecasting-framework
items.description: A scalable, market-agnostic forecasting pipeline for automotive Total Industry Volume (TIV) in multiple countries. Demonstrates high-level data preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, and evaluation estrategies using classical, machine learning, and foundation time-series models.

items.name: AI-Based-Log-Investigation-Framework-for-Cyber-Forensics
items.description: AI-powered cyber forensics tool that automatically analyzes system logs, detects anomalies using Machine Learning, reconstructs attack timelines, and generates forensic reports.

items.description: Materials informatics framework for predicting microstructure–mechanical property correlations in non-heat-treatable aluminum alloys (5xxx/3xxx series) using machine learning.

items.description: Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: Heart-Disease-Prediction-Using-Machine-Learning-Classification-Models
items.description: This project focuses on developing a machine learning framework for the early and accurate prediction of heart disease. By leveraging medical parameters like age, cholesterol, and ECG results, the project aims to replace traditional, time-consuming diagnostic methods with efficient classification models.

items.name: metro-delay-prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework to predict Hyderabad Metro train delays using GTFS schedule data, realistic delay simulation, operational insights, and cross-validation on Indian Railways data.

items.name: Student_Dropout_Prediction
items.description: This repository contains the implementation and research documentation for a machine learning framework designed to predict university student dropouts. The project focuses on addressing class imbalance using SMOTE and ensuring model transparency through SHAP (Shapley Additive Explanations).

items.name: AvailD
items.description: Artificial-Intelligence AvailDA platform featuring Predictive-Maintenance-Scheduling technology and advanced Machine-Learning-Driven-Insights for modern Data-Scalability-Framework

items.name: Border-Guard-AI
items.description: BorderGuard AI is a multi-modal security framework designed to protect critical border infrastructure. It combines Unsupervised Machine Learning for sensor anomaly detection with Computer Vision for real-time surveillance monitoring.

items.name: VulnSight
items.description: VulnSight is an automated vulnerability triage framework that combats alert fatigue. It combines active infrastructure reconnaissance with Random Forest Machine Learning for context-aware risk prioritization, and leverages Google Gemini to generate tailored, 3-step remediation strategies.

items.name: BittensorT
items.description: Edge-Aware Auto-Scaling Distributed Ledger Fabric with Machine-Learning Orchestrator Framework featuring Edge-Computing capabilities with Real-time architecture

items.name: PhalaCloud
items.description: Machine-Learning Orchestration Engine enables Scalable, Intelligent Distributed Processing through Auto-Scaling and High-Throughput Capabilities Framework.

items.name: AI-Predictive-Model
items.description: Designed a machine learning model using Python and frameworks such as Scikit-learn and TensorFlow to predict human brain awareness using EEG brain signals.

items.name: FuturesHub
items.description: Artificial-Intelligence powered FuturesHub enables Scalable, Intelligent, Distributed Real-time Data Processing with Advanced Machine Learning Integration Framework.

items.name: Capture-of-Gaseous-VOCs-Using-Gold-Nanobipyramid-Covalent-Organic-Framework-for-SERS-Detection
items.description: We further introduced PCA and four machine learning models to evaluate the recognition ability of SERS sensing platform for different volatile organic compounds.

items.name: LitterVision
items.description: LitterVision AI is an edge-ready, machine-learning-powered visual intelligence framework designed to automate and optimize the classification of municipal solid waste. By leveraging modern Deep Learning, LitterVision aims to solve the critical "last-mile" sorting problem in global recycling infrastructures.

items.name: LDopa-ml
items.description: This repository provides data and Python code for machine learning–based optimization of L-DOPA extraction from Vicia faba. It uses CART and ensemble models to identify high-yield conditions, offering an interpretable decision-support framework for scalable and industrial extraction processes.

items.name: air-pollution-forecast

items.description: Machine learning-based framework for anomaly detection and route optimization in AIS data using multi-phase analysis including preprocessing, MARL-based scenario generation, and predictive modeling.

items.name: career-guidance-backend
items.description: AI-powered career guidance system built with Django REST Framework and machine learning.

items.name: ChromeCRISPR
items.description: Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for CRISPR/Cas9 On-Target Activity Prediction

items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics
items.description: This project is a Digital Twin–based predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: Multitask-Machine-Learning-for-News-Classification-and-Sentiment-Analysis
items.description: Based on DistilBERT, a multi-task learning framework was constructed, integrating Dropout and residual connections. Through grid search and early stopping methods, the hyperparameters were optimized to achieve joint modeling of six categories of news and sentiment classification.

items.name: California-Earthquake-Forecasting-and-Analysis
items.description: A physics-informed machine learning framework for earthquake forecasting in California (1995-2025). This project integrates statistical seismology (Gutenberg-Richter law, Omori's Law) with XGBoost to identify predictive precursors to major seismic events.

items.name: Autonomous-Trading-Signal-Engine-Quantitative-Trend-Prediction-Framework
items.description: This project integrates historical stock data, technical indicators, sentiment analysis, and machine learning (XGBoost, Random Forest) to predict trends and generate Buy/Sell/Hold signals.

items.name: data-prep-practices-length-of-stay-analysis
items.description: This repository contains the full analysis, methodology, and results for a machine learning study focused on predicting Length of Stay in hospital admissions using **Electronic Health Record (EHR)** data.   The project explores how different preprocessing strategies and model frameworks impact predictive performance and feature interpretability.

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: senegal-yield-climate-extremes
items.description: Machine learning framework (Random Forest and LASSO) to assess the impact of climate extremes on crop yield anomalies in Senegal using CMIP6 projections and SHAP analysis.

items.name: bone-fracture-detection-using-quantum-machine-learning
items.description: Quantum Transfer Learning (QTL) framework for radiographic fracture detection. Benchmarking ResNet, VGG, and DenseNet with Variational Quantum Circuits (VQC).

items.description: framework IoT implementazione di una pipeline completa per il training, la distribuzione e l'inferenza di modelli di Machine Learning

items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.
